creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
DESCR should have WWW info.  Or MUST rather, because most likely the
users of the port cannot reach Vladimir's web site to get the latest
information, except freebsd-emulation subscribers.

Fix: 

/
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."--PEoFcbEiEiGXTEs4xyhgtEDdI1JYaJK9K4uGzchfnqmjzOgX
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- DESCR~	Fri Jan 28 21:40:27 2000
+++ DESCR	Fri Feb 25 04:04:47 2000
@@ -2,3 +2,9 @@
 run on FreeBSD using the Linux compatibility mode.  VMware can be used to
 run IBM's OS/2, Microsoft Windows 95/98, Microsoft NT, Linux, or any other
 operating system that runs on the i486.
+
+Official VMware web site:
+WWW:	http://www.vmware.com/
+
+FreeBSD port information by Vladimir N. Silyaev:
+	http://www.mindspring.com/~vsilyaev/vmware/
